name: orchestrator
description: Autonomous work orchestrator — manages priority queues, isolated dev environments, Claude worker sessions, and delegator instances
author: Your Name

status.description: Show orchestrator status — queue, sessions, worktrees, and next-up items

add-work.description: Add a new work item to the orchestrator queue

activate.description: Activate a queued work item — create worktree, spawn session, start delegator

teardown.description: Tear down a work stream — kill session, remove worktree, preserve branch

discover.description: Discover new work items from configured sources

health.description: Run health check — detect zombie sessions, stalled streams, and issues
